_comment: Mid-call state for slr_agent. Simulates entry after slr_fetch_source has already returned papers from both sources (openalex_results and asta_results populated). The next node slr_collect_papers will deduplicate, then slr_synthesise will run.
query: RCT evidence for insecticide-treated bednets reducing under-5 malaria mortality in sub-Saharan Africa
context: Malaria program reviewing LLIN distribution investments. Focus on under-5 mortality outcomes in high-burden SSA countries 2019–2024.

openalex_results.title: Insecticide-treated nets for preventing malaria
openalex_results.abstract: Cochrane review of 22 RCTs. ITNs reduced child mortality by 18% and uncomplicated episodes of P. falciparum malaria by 50% in areas of stable transmission.

openalex_results.title: Long-lasting insecticidal nets for preventing malaria in children
openalex_results.abstract: Updated Cochrane review. LLINs reduced malaria incidence by 40–50% and all-cause child mortality by 18% vs no nets across 25 RCTs.

asta_results.title: Efficacy of pyrethroid-PBO nets in areas with pyrethroid-resistant malaria vectors
asta_results.abstract: Cluster RCT in Tanzania. PBO nets reduced malaria prevalence by 44% compared to conventional pyrethroid nets (RR 0.56, 95% CI 0.41–0.77).

asta_results.title: Effectiveness of Olyset Plus, a permethrin+PBO LLIN, against malaria in Tanzania
asta_results.abstract: Phase III trial confirming PBO LLINs superiority in pyrethroid-resistant settings, with 29% reduction in malaria incidence vs standard LLINs.

expanded_queries: LLIN randomized controlled trial child mortality Africa
long-lasting insecticidal net effectiveness sub-Saharan Africa under-five
